channel.title: Notice board | Unimi
channel.description: General notice board of the University of Milan "La Statale"

item.title: Call for the English language development course in view of the B2 First (FCE) exam
item.description: Registration is open for the English language development course with a view to sitting the Cambridge B2 First (FCE) exam. Classes, for the whole duration of 20 hours, are taking place in person in September-October at the SLAM Centre according to the calendar reported in the call.%0A%0A📄 Read the call for further details

item.title: Call for the English language development course in view of the C2 Proficiency (CPE) exam
item.description: Registration is open for the English language development course with a view to sitting the Cambridge C2 Proficiency (CPE) exam. Classes, for the whole duration of 20 hours, are taking place in person in September-October at the SLAM Centre according to the calendar reported in the call.%0A%0A📄 Read the call for further details

item.title: VISA applicants language proficiency
item.description: In accordance with ministerial guidelines, visa applicants are required to demonstrate a B2 level of proficiency in either Italian or English in order to obtain a study visa. The required language must correspond to the language of instruction of the degree programme.%0A

item.title: Virgilio Program 2026/27 - Student ranking
item.description: On 4 May 2026, the Selection Committee reviewed all applications received in response to the 2026/27 Call for Applications for the Virgilio program. %0AThe final ranking, including the names of the 10 selected applicants, is provided below.%0A%0A📄 Virgilio Program 2026/27 - Student ranking

item.title: Call for admissions to Collegio di Milano - a. y. 2026-2027
